name: RBL Bank World Safari Credit Card

domestic: 2 complimentary visits per quarter, unlocked by spending ₹35,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter
international: 2 complimentary visits per calendar year via Priority Pass
1 additional spend-based lounge visit per quarter on spending ₹50,000 or more in a calendar quarter

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹2.5 Lakhs
15,000 bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹5 Lakhs
₹10,000 Taj, Amazon, Croma, Myntra or MakeMyTrip voucher on annual spend of ₹7.5 Lakhs

milestoneBenefits: Earn 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of ₹2.5 Lakhs
Earn 15,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of ₹5 Lakhs
Earn ₹10,000 brand voucher (Taj, Amazon, Croma, Myntra, MakeMyTrip) on annual spends of ₹7.5 Lakhs
additionalBenefits: Zero forex markup on international transactions
4 complimentary rounds of golf and 1 golf lesson per month
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal.
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit against the card bill.
No direct airline miles transfer — points are redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers through the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in) at Rs 0.25 per point.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹250/month).
International transactions do not earn reward points (zero forex markup still applies).

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source with monthly salary meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
International transactions do not earn reward points (zero forex markup still applies).
Spend-based extra lounge visit can be accessed through a voucher issued by Lounge Key. Subsequent Priority Pass visits are charged at $35.
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit. Redemption fee of Rs 99 + GST applies per request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
No direct airline miles transfer programme — points redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers at Rs 0.25 per point.
